---
name: Improvement / Tech Debt
about: Refactoring, performance improvement, or technical debt reduction
title: "[improve] "
labels: improvement
assignees: ""
---

## Context

Describe the current state and why it needs improvement.

## Proposed Improvement

What change do you propose? (refactor, optimize, upgrade, simplify)

## Motivation

Why should we make this change now? What is the impact of NOT doing it?

- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Maintainability
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Developer experience
- [ ] Dependency upgrade

## Risks / Breaking Changes

Any risks or breaking changes to consider?

## Success Criteria

How do we verify the improvement worked?

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
